programme.title: Dean Spanley
programme.desc: England, 1904. Gentleman Henslowe Fisk struggles to cope with his father's aloofness after the loss of the old man's wife and elder son. Then Henslowe becomes convinced that Dean Spanley, an affable local cleric with a taste for expensive wine, is the reincarnation of his father's childhood dog.

programme.title: Chitty Chitty Bang Bang
programme.desc: Inventor Caractacus Potts transforms an old Grand Prix car into a magical flying vehicle that teleports him and his family to a kingdom ruled by the evil Baron Bomburst.

programme.title: The Guernsey Literary Society
programme.desc: In post-war England, a writer forms an unexpected bond with the quirky members of a book club on Guernsey, uncovering their stories of resilience and love during the Nazi occupation.

programme.title: Too Cool to Kill
programme.desc: Amateur actor Wei Chenggong receives an invitation from famous actress Milan to play her leading man. However, unbeknownst to Mr. Wei, the new gig has landed him directly in the middle of a dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Somewhere in Time
programme.desc: A young writer becomes obsessed with a mysterious actress and, through self-hypnosis, travels back in time to meet her.

programme.title: Master Cheng
programme.desc: Following the death of his wife, professional chef Cheng travels with his young son to a remote village in Finland to connect with an old Finnish friend he once met in Shanghai. Upon arrival, nobody in the village seems to know his friend but local cafe owner Sirkka offers him accommodation. In return, Cheng helps her in the kitchen, surprising the locals with the delights of Chinese cuisine.

programme.title: Sabotage
programme.desc: A London cinema owner hides a deadly secret as part of a terrorist ring. When suspicion grows around him, his wife and a detective close in - unaware he's using her young brother to deliver bombs.

programme.title: The Lady in the Van
programme.desc: Alan Bennett's story is based on the true story of Miss Shepherd, a woman of uncertain origins who 'temporarily' parks her van in Bennett's London driveway and proceeds to live there for 15 years. What begins as a begrudging favour becomes a relationship that will change both their lives.

programme.title: Master Gardener
programme.desc: Narvel, a dedicated gardener, leads a quiet life until his employer forces him to mentor her troubled great-niece, Maya. Their bond uncovers buried secrets, unraveling a dark and dangerous past.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: In this third installment of the adrenaline-fueled action franchise, skilled assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) returns with a $14 million price tag on his head and an army of bounty-hunting killers on his trail. After killing a member of the shadowy international assassin's guild, the High Table, John Wick is excommunicado, but the world's most ruthless hit men and women await his every turn.

programme.title: Nymphomaniac: Vol 1
programme.desc: Joe, a self-diagnosed nymphomaniac is discovered badly beaten in an alley by an older bachelor, Seligman who takes her into his home. As he tends to her wounds, she recounts the erotic story of her adolescence and young adulthood. Directed by Lars von Trier, stars Charlotte Gainsbourg, Christian Slater, Uma Thurman.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Classic film review series hosted by legends Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton. In this episode they review The Gift, Save the Last Dance, The Broken Hearts Club, Amores Perros and interview Billy Connolly.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: Some of the biggest film stars in history rose to fame during the 'golden age' of Hollywood, in the early and mid-20th century. We profile some of these stars who became household names.

programme.title: Master Cheng
programme.desc: Following the death of his wife, professional chef Cheng travels with his young son to a remote village in Finland to connect with an old Finnish friend he once met in Shanghai. Upon arrival, nobody in the village seems to know his friend but local cafe owner Sirkka offers him accommodation. In return, Cheng helps her in the kitchen, surprising the locals with the delights of Chinese cuisine.

programme.title: Sabotage
programme.desc: A London cinema owner hides a deadly secret as part of a terrorist ring. When suspicion grows around him, his wife and a detective close in - unaware he's using her young brother to deliver bombs.

programme.title: The Lady in the Van
programme.desc: Alan Bennett's story is based on the true story of Miss Shepherd, a woman of uncertain origins who 'temporarily' parks her van in Bennett's London driveway and proceeds to live there for 15 years. What begins as a begrudging favour becomes a relationship that will change both their lives.

programme.title: Godland
programme.desc: In the late 1800s, a Danish priest journeys to Iceland to build a church and document its people. As he ventures deeper into the harsh land, he loses sight of his mission and moral compass.

programme.title: Dean Spanley
programme.desc: England, 1904. Gentleman Henslowe Fisk struggles to cope with his father's aloofness after the loss of the old man's wife and elder son. Then Henslowe becomes convinced that Dean Spanley, an affable local cleric with a taste for expensive wine, is the reincarnation of his father's childhood dog.

programme.title: Limelight
programme.desc: Depressed over her failed dance career, a despondent ballerina attempts to take her own life, only to be rescued by an impoverished, once-famous stage clown. The comedian helps revive the dancer's health and prospects, and in the process recovers his own self-esteem as well. Directed by and starring Charlie Chaplin. Also stars Claire Bloom, Nigel Bruce and Buster Keaton.

programme.title: Spitfire
programme.desc: Exploring the history of the Spitfire airplane in commemoration of the Royal Air Force's centenary.

programme.title: Tigerland
programme.desc: A recruit (Colin Farrell) tries to get discharged from infantry training for Vietnam at Fort Lake, La., in 1971.

programme.title: The Fox
programme.desc: At the dawn of World War II, a young motorcycle courier in the Austrian army encounters a wounded fox cub and takes it with him to occupied France. The soldier and the fox develop an unlikely bond.

programme.title: Rheingold
programme.desc: Xatar tells the dramatic story of Giwar Hajabi, from his tough beginnings as an immigrant in Germany to becoming a criminal mastermind. After a botched deal, he plans a daring gold heist to settle his debts.

programme.title: Master Gardener
programme.desc: Narvel, a dedicated gardener, leads a quiet life until his employer forces him to mentor her troubled great-niece, Maya. Their bond uncovers buried secrets, unraveling a dark and dangerous past.
